positive: Minimalist abstract celestial map print, featuring a stylized silhouette of a crescent moon, shooting stars, and constellations formed by intricate geometric lines and dots. The main subject is a stylized, deep indigo and cosmic teal color palette, contrasting sharply with vibrant metallic gold accents that form the star trails. Composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical, suitable for full-body apparel printing. The style should be a blend of Art Deco celestial mechanics and modern line art, ensuring clean, high-contrast silhouettes and crisp edges. Include subtle texture that suggests high-quality screen printing or linocut texture.
negative: blurry, messy, artifacts, low resolution, noisy, text, writing, signature, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, muted colors
